=Module <<a_api_type | module Server >> =
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Server>>>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api text=".." | module Server >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>
----
<<pre id="VALsection" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|section>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Logs>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|src>>>>>><<pre id="VALreload" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|reload>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?file: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Reload the configuration of the server~. ~The optional parameter
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~?file>> may be used to read the configuration from another
    file~.
>>
<<pre id="VALexec" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|exec>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Xml>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|xml>> list list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Start the server with a configuration file~. ~Never returns~.
>>
<<pre id="VALstart" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|start>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?ports: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >><<a_api text="Config.Socket_type.t" | type Config.Socket_type.t >> * int<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?ssl_ports: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >><<a_api text="Config.Socket_type.t" | type Config.Socket_type.t >> * int<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?ssl_info: >><<a_api text="Config.ssl_info" | type Config.ssl_info >> option <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?default_charset: >>string option <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?logdir: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?datadir: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?uploaddir: >>string option <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?maxuploadfilesize: >>int64 option <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?syslog_facility: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Syslog_message>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|facility>> option <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?configfile: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?usedefaulthostname: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?pidfile: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?mimefile: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?verbose: >>unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?veryverbose: >>unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?silent: >>unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?daemon: >>unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?debug: >>unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?debugmode: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?minthreads: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?maxthreads: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?max_number_of_connections: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?client_timeout: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?server_timeout: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?shutdown_timeout: >>float option <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?filebuffersize: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?maxrequestbodysize: >>int64 option <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?maxrequestbodysizeinmemory: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?bindir: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?extdir: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?command_pipe: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?disablepartialrequests: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?respect_pipeline: >>unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?maxretries: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Extensions>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|host_config>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Start the server with some instructions~. ~Never returns~.
    ~It takes as main parameter a list of virtual hosts ~(see <<a_api | val Server.host >> below~)~. 


Options behave exactly like their <<a_manual chapter="config"|configuration file>>
counterparts~.
>>
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code" id="TYPEinstruction"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|type>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|instruction>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~=>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<a_api text="Extensions.virtual_hosts" | type Extensions.virtual_hosts >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<a_api text="Extensions.config_info" | type Extensions.config_info >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_base>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lib>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Url>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|path>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="Extensions.extension" | type Extensions.extension >>>> >><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The type of instructions to be used inside an host or site~.
    ~Instructions are defined by extensions ~(~Staticmod~, ~Eliom~, etc~.~)
>>
<<pre id="VALhost" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|host>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?regexp: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?port: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?default_hostname: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?default_httpport: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?default_httpsport: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?default_protocol_is_https: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?mime_assoc: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_http>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Charset_mime>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|mime_assoc>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?charset_assoc: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_http>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Charset_mime>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|charset_assoc>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?default_directory_index: >>string list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?list_directory_content: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?follow_symlinks: >>[ `Always | `No | `Owner_match ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?do_not_serve_404: >><<a_api text="Extensions.do_not_serve" | type Extensions.do_not_serve >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?do_not_serve_403: >><<a_api text="Extensions.do_not_serve" | type Extensions.do_not_serve >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?uploaddir: >>string option <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?maxuploadfilesize: >>int64 option <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<a_api text="instruction" | type Server.instruction >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Extensions>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|host_config>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~You can define one or several virtual hosts corresponding to a given
    server name or port~.
>>
<<pre id="VALsite" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|site>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?charset: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Ocsigen_base>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lib>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Url>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|path>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<a_api text="instruction" | type Server.instruction >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="instruction" | type Server.instruction >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Each host may contain some sub~-sites corresponding to
    subdirectories in the ~U~R~L~.
>>
